text:
First, determine the time zone offset between Australia/Sydney and Europe/Athens on June 26, 1910.  

In 1910:  
- Sydney was on AEST (UTC+10) year-round (no DST then).  
- Athens was on EET (UTC+2) year-round (no DST then).  

Offset difference: UTC+10 to UTC+2 = 10 − 2 = 8 hours behind Athens.  

So, 12:00 AM (midnight) June 26, 1910 in Sydney is 8 hours earlier in Athens:  
12:00 AM − 8 hours = 4:00 PM (16:00) on June 25, 1910.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1910-06-25 16:00
